data.title: GitLab Appoints Siva Padisetty as Chief Technology Officer
data.description:
Veteran engineering leader brings two decades of experience scaling cloud platforms and modernizing enterprise systems

SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- All-Remote - GitLab Inc. ( GTLB ), the most comprehensive intelligent DevSecOps platform, today announced the appointment of Siva Padisetty as Chief Technology Officer, effective January 15, 2026. Padisetty will lead GitLab’s software engineering, operations, and customer support teams to execute the company's technical vision and strategy and oversee the development and delivery of GitLab's ( GTLB ) products. He succeeds Sabrina Farmer, who stepped down from her role and will remain in an advisory capacity to ensure a seamless transition through January 31, 2026.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260112604686/en/

“We are thrilled to welcome Siva to GitLab,” said Bill Staples, GitLab ( GTLB ) chief executive officer. “Siva is the engineer's CTO. He's spent his career building and scaling some of the most critical infrastructure platforms in the industry, including systems that manage millions of instances and foundational tools that enterprises rely on every day. That experience will be invaluable as we continue building GitLab ( GTLB ) into a generational company and delivering on our vision of intelligent orchestration for DevSecOps.”

“Siva brings deep technical expertise and a track record of building platforms at scale,” said Sid Sijbrandij, GitLab ( GTLB ) co-founder and executive board chair. “He's built systems that developers actually want to use while meeting the demands of enterprise customers, and he's done it at a billion-dollar scale. The board looks forward to working with him as GitLab ( GTLB ) enters its next phase of growth."

“The real opportunity with AI isn't just faster code, it's a smarter software development lifecycle. GitLab's ( GTLB ) end-to-end platform makes that possible,” said Siva Padisetty, GitLab ( GTLB ) chief technology officer. “Throughout my career, I've focused on building systems that improve the developer experience while helping them maintain the security and reliability needed to ship software at scale. GitLab ( GTLB ) is uniquely positioned to help enterprises navigate this shift, and I'm excited to be part of it.”

Padisetty brings more than 20 years of experience building and scaling distributed systems at Microsoft, AWS, and, most recently, as CTO at New Relic, where he led the transformation of the company's monolith into modern, modular cloud services while scaling the business to over $1B in revenue. Prior to New Relic, he spent more than eight years at AWS, most recently as GM of Cloud Management, and 18 years at Microsoft. Across these companies, he led engineering teams that built, transformed, and operated some of the world’s largest services, from modernizing existing platforms to delivering new services from the ground up.

Padisetty holds a Master of Science in Computer Science and a Bachelor of Science in Mechanical Engineering from the College of Engineering, Guindy, Anna University in Chennai, India.

About GitLab ( GTLB )

GitLab ( GTLB ) is the most comprehensive, intelligent DevSecOps platform for software innovation. GitLab ( GTLB ) enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100* trust GitLab ( GTLB ) to ship better, more secure software faster.

*Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab ( GTLB ) data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab ( GTLB ).

data.title: Acumatica Names Jon Pollock Chief Product Officer to Lead Next Phase of Cloud ERP Innovation
data.description:
Seasoned SaaS and Payments Leader Brings Deep Product and Platform Expertise to Support Mid-Market Growth and Industry Innovation

BELLEVUE, Wash.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Acumatica, the industry-leading cloud ERP provider, today announced the appointment of Jon Pollock as Chief Product Officer (CPO). In this role, Pollock will lead Acumatica’s global product management and user experience organizations, overseeing product strategy, innovation, and delivery across the company’s cloud ERP platform. He will play a key role in advancing Acumatica’s product vision and AI innovation strategy as well as supporting growth initiatives across its core industries, including construction, manufacturing, distribution, retail, and professional services.

This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260112824579/en/

Pollock’s appointment comes at a critical moment for Acumatica, as mid-market businesses seek modern management systems that will scale with them through operational complexity, regulatory pressure, and economic uncertainty. As CPO, Pollock will focus on advancing Acumatica’s customer-driven product roadmap, integrating innovative AI capabilities, strengthening platform functionality, and ensuring the company continues to deliver flexible solutions that help customers operate more efficiently and confidently.

“Acumatica has built something truly unique in enterprise software—a deeply engaged community that helps shape the product,” said Pollock. “I’m excited to join a company whose primary focus is on delivering technology to mid-market organizations that’s both powerful and practical. My focus will be on driving innovation, including leveraging AI to deliver insights and automation that directly impact how growing businesses operate, scale, and compete.”

Pollock brings more than 25 years of experience building and scaling SaaS and payments platforms at high-growth technology companies. Most recently, he served as CPO at Procare Solutions and general manager of Procare’s ChildPlus division, leading product management, user experience, sales, marketing, and customer support teams across childcare management SaaS, payments, and early learning solutions. He also held senior product leadership roles at Worldpay, Asurion, Dell, Intel, Polaroid, and Novell.

Pollock succeeds Ali Jani, who joined Acumatica in 2010 and has been instrumental in developing the company’s business strategy, product evolution, and ecosystem growth.

"Jon has the experience, vision, and strong track record of leading dynamic teams to execute our product strategy and empower the people who use our software every day," said John Case, CEO of Acumatica. “As we thank Ali for his extraordinary contributions over the past 15 years, Jon’s the ideal leader to grab the baton and continue our commitment to building a platform that’s powerful, accessible, and genuinely helpful for the businesses we serve.”

Pollock’s appointment as CPO comes as Acumatica prepares to preview the next phase of its product roadmap at Summit 2026. Summit registration remains open, and individuals can still sign up to attend the event by visiting summit.acumatica.com.

About Acumatica

Acumatica Cloud ERP is a comprehensive business management solution that was born in the cloud and built for more connected, collaborative ways of working. Designed explicitly to enable small and mid-market companies to thrive in today’s digital economy, Acumatica’s flexible solution, customer-friendly business practices and industry-specific functionality help growing businesses adapt to fast-moving markets and take control of their future. For more information, visit acumatica.com or follow us on LinkedIn.
